title: soundvisual
description: to obtain the best virtual and sound experience
body:
This modpack adds a better visual and sound experience that can be combined with shaders and has the best optimization mod, sodium with iris ## how to install it? To install it you need to have the modrinth or prismarine Launcher app, for more information: here ## shader pack Thanks to the Resourcify mod included in the pack and also to iris shaders you can open the shaders screen and you will be able to see a "+" symbol when you click on that button it will take you to a screen where you can download your favorite shaders from modrinth the shaders Recommended are complementary shaders and superDuperVanilla shaders ## fresh animations The pack comes with fresh animations, which is a more complete animation texture pack. It adds better movement and animations to mobs such as villagers, sheep, cows, etc. # mods included
  • Ambient Sounds
  • better F3
  • blur
  • cloth config
  • creative Core
  • do a barrel roll
  • dinamic fps
  • eating animations
  • entity model features
  • entity texture features
  • entityculling
  • fabric api
  • fabric language kotlin
  • fallingleaves
  • ferritecode
  • frist person model
  • iris shaders
  • lambdynamiclights
  • lithium
  • modelfix
  • modmenu
  • notenoughanimations
  • PresenceFootsteps
  • reeses sodium options
  • Resourcify
  • Sodium Extra
  • sodium
  • soundphysics
  • visuality
# texture Packs included
  • Fresh animations
# why download it This modpack offers you a better visual and auditory experience, which makes it excellent for people who want it to look as realistic as possible as well as being a little more fun. # which adds This modpack adds more sounds with the ambient sounds and presence footsteps so that the game is more immersive, it also adds animations when eating dynamic lights more particles, a fun elytras system, a fix for texture models, optimization mods so that the game does not go wrong. such as sodium, dimamic fps etc, two mods to make fresh animations work correctly, shaders are not included but there is the Resourcify mod that adds the ability to download modrinth content from the game as shaders texture packs and datapacks ## Contact We are working on the contact page of our website, for now you can send us an email at kendersoporte@gmail.com
